title: bidens mesfinii
intro: Bidens mesfinii, also known as Mesfin's biddens, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bidens mesfinii include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Bidens mesfinii can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
